# CMakeLists.txt for mission "Find Unit Test"
# Generated by op2-codegen-editor; uses the TitanAPI library at ../../TitanAPI/.
#
#     cmake -S . -B build -G "Visual Studio 18 2026" -A Win32
#     cmake --build build --config Release
# Output: build/Release/cFindUnit.dll

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(Find_Unit_Test VERSION 1.0.0 LANGUAGES CXX RC DESCRIPTION "TitanAPI mission: Find Unit Test")

if(NOT MSVC)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "Outpost 2 is a 32-bit MSVC target - build with MSVC (cl.exe).")
endif()
if(NOT CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 4)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "Must be a 32-bit (x86) build. Re-configure with -A Win32.")
endif()

set(RC_OUTPUT_NAME "cFindUnit")
configure_file(version.rc.in "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/version.rc" @ONLY)

add_library(cFindUnit SHARED
  mission.cpp
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/version.rc"
  op2_mission.hpp
  op2_log.hpp
  op2_crash.hpp
)

target_include_directories(cFindUnit PRIVATE
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}"
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../TitanAPI/TitanAPI/include")

target_compile_definitions(cFindUnit PRIVATE TITANAPI_VERSION="${PROJECT_VERSION}")
target_compile_options(cFindUnit PRIVATE /std:c++23preview)

set_target_properties(cFindUnit PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "cFindUnit" PREFIX "")
set_property(TARGET cFindUnit PROPERTY MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
